title: T-007 — pick_overrides table migration
prompt:
# T-007 — pick_overrides table migration

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §5.7, §9.6.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create `pick_overrides` table to audit FEFO/FIFO deviations per Q6B pattern.

## Implementation contract
Add `packages/db/src/schema/pick-overrides.ts` per §5.7: id, tenant_id, pick_request_id (varchar 64), wo_id, to_line_id, suggested_lp_id FK, picked_lp_id FK, reason_code ENUM ('batch_exhaustion','qa_release','physical_accessibility','line_priority','operator_decision','other'), reason_text, confirmed_by, confirmed_at, delta_days INT.
CHECK: when reason_code='other' then reason_text NOT NULL (DB trigger or app-level — choose CHECK with COALESCE NULLIF for app-friendly behavior).

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/src/schema/pick-overrides.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_pick_overrides.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/pick-overrides.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when pick_overrides is inspected, then PRD §5.7 columns exist with the 6-value reason_code enum.
2. Given INSERT with reason_code='other' and reason_text NULL, when committed, then DB raises a CHECK violation.
3. Given INSERT with picked_lp_id == suggested_lp_id, when committed, then DB raises a CHECK violation.

## Test strategy
- RED: pick-overrides.test.ts asserts the three behaviors.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test pick-overrides`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow other-reason without text.
- Do not log overrides where picked == suggested (defeats audit).
- Do not implement service logic.

pipeline_inputs.details: Drizzle schema + migration. CHECK reason_text required when reason_code='other'; CHECK picked_lp_id != suggested_lp_id.
